			<section id="material-options" role="tabpanel">
<div>
<p><strong>Six Customizable Banner Materials</strong></p>

<p>Your banner is made with the finest materials available and <a href="https://www.banners.com/banner-printing"> printed using state-of-the-art, large-format printers </a> for vibrant colors that pop. All banners are manufactured and printed in the USA.</p>

<p>Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature-sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex., a 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your customer service representative to discuss your specific application.</p>
</div>

<table class="table table-striped">
	<tbody>
		<tr>
			<td><strong>13 oz Matte Vinyl Banners</strong></td>
			<td>
			<p>Our high-quality 13 oz matte vinyl banner material is our most popular banner material. It has a low shine and rich color gamut.</p>
			</td>
		</tr>
		<tr>
			<td><strong>13 oz Gloss Vinyl Banners</strong></td>
			<td>
			<p>Our high-quality 13 oz gloss vinyl banner material has a high shine to it that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics to give it a high-end look.</p>
			</td>
		</tr>
		<tr>
			<td><strong>18 oz Vinyl Banners</strong></td>
			<td>
			<p>Our extra heavy-duty matte 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality.</p>
			</td>
		</tr>
		<tr>
			<td><strong>Mesh Banners</strong></td>
			<td>
			<p>Made with 8 oz PVC polyester mesh material that has a criss-crossed breathable scrim that allows a 37% airflow. Mesh banners are ideal for outdoor and windy conditions.</p>
			</td>
		</tr>
		<tr>
			<td><strong>Fabric Banners</strong></td>
			<td>
			<p>Made with a premium nylon/polyester blend material called Banner Soft. This fabric is ideal for indoor displays and has a low shine that produces a high-end look and feel.</p>
			</td>
		</tr>
		<tr>
			<td><strong>Adhesive Banners</strong></td>
			<td>
			<p>Standard Tack Vinyl: Standard tack vinyl can be used both indoors and outdoors, with an outdoor lifespan of 3 to 5 years when properly installed and maintained.</p>

			<p>Extreme Tack Vinyl: Extreme Tack vinyl is white calendered vinyl material with a high tack adhesive that is specifically designed to adhere to low energy surfaces.</p>
			</td>
		</tr>
	</tbody>
</table>
</section>

  <div style="padding: 0 15px;">
    <p><strong>Heat Welded Hems & Grommets</strong></p>
    <p>Hems consist of one inch of the vinyl banner material folded over and heated together to form a strong hem. We recommend hems for all banners to increase durability.</p>

    <p>You will have the following options when selecting hems and grommets:</p>

    <table border="1">
      <tbody>
        <tr>
          <td style="padding: 5px; width: 50%;">
            <strong>Top and Bottom Only Hems</strong> – Standard finishing option for vinyl banners.
          </td>
          <td style="padding: 5px; width: 50%;">
            <strong>All Four Sides Hems</strong> – All 4 sides of the banner will be heat welded and grommeted.
          </td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>
            <img alt="Top and Bottom Grommets Only Example" src="https://web2printdata.blob.core.windows.net/w2p-cms-1/24-09-04-BANS-Top-and-bottom-hems-and-grommets-only-2.png" style="width: 100%">
          </td>
          <td>
            <img alt="All 4 Sides Hems & Grommets Example" src="https://web2printdata.blob.core.windows.net/w2p-cms-1/24-09-04-BANS-Top-and-bottom-hems-and-grommets-all-sides.png" style="width: 100%">
          </td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>

    <p><strong>Pole Pockets</strong></p>
    <p>Pole pockets consist of 2, 3, or 4 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top, or bottom of the banner.</p>

    <ul>
      <li><strong>2" Pole Pockets</strong> – fits a pole 3/4" in diameter</li>
      <li><strong>3" Pole Pockets</strong> – fits a pole 1 1/4" in diameter</li>
      <li><strong>4" Pole Pockets</strong> – fits a pole 1 1/2" in diameter</li>
    </ul>

    <p>By selecting pole pockets, there will be no increase in the finished size of your banner.</p>
    <p><em>Pole pockets are not available with reinforced hems or corners.</em></p>

    <p><strong>Reinforced Corners</strong></p>
    <p>Reinforced corners provide extra strength and are grommeted to each corner of the banner.</p>

    <p><strong>Reinforced Hems</strong></p>
    <p>Reinforced hems are a PVC-coated webbing which increases the strength of the banner.</p>

    <p><em>You cannot have reinforced hems with pole pockets.</em></p>

    <p><strong>Double-Sided Banner Finishing</strong></p>
    <p>We can finish double-sided banners up to 150 square feet. Larger sizes require a custom quote.</p>

    <p>
      To learn more, visit our
      <a href="https://www.banners.com/vinyl-banner-finishing-options" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        vinyl banner finishing options
      </a> page.
    </p>

    <p>
      We do not recommend wind slits in banners. For more information, visit our
      <a href="https://www.banners.com/wind-slits">wind slit banners</a> page.
    </p>
  </div>

</section>

<p><strong>General Shipping Guidelines</strong></p>

<p>If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at <a href="tel:13203915300">(320) 391-5300</a> prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped via UPS Ground. We offer a 1–3 day ground shipment to 90% of the United States.</p>

<p><strong>You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.</strong></p>

<p>Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.</p>

<p>After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. We will not refund the banner cost if UPS or any other shipping company has a delay in your package.</p>

<p>Delays due to natural disasters or anything beyond our control will not result in shipping refunds. If the product is damaged in shipping, the damaged goods must be returned, and then a replacement product will be sent.</p>

<p>Lost packages will be replaced after the shipping company confirms loss. This generally takes 7–10 business days after the initial scheduled delivery.</p>

<p><strong>International Shipping Notes:</strong></p>

<p>For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS.</p>
</div>

<p><strong>Fabric Banners</strong></p>

<p>This product is made in our Minnesota facility only.</p>

<div class="row p-2 gr-type" id="moreAbout">
<div class="container">
<h2 class="text-center">Common Uses and Benefits of Vinyl Banners</h2>

<p class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Vinyl banners are one of the most popular signage options around the globe due to their durability, flexibility, and aesthetic appeal. We offer a wide range of vinyl sign materials to meet your specific needs, ensuring your message stands out at any event.</p>

<h3 class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Trade Shows & Exhibitions</h3>

<p>Make a memorable first impression at trade shows with our custom vinyl banners, designed to capture the attention of potential clients and partners.</p>

<p class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Perfect for booth displays, our banners allow you to showcase your brand, products, or services in a professional and attractive manner. Check out our <a href="https://www.banners.com/trade-show-banners">Trade Show Banners</a>.</p>

<h3 class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Retail Sales & Promotions</h3>

<p class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Hosting a sale or launching a new product? Vinyl banners are a fantastic way to attract attention both in-store and outdoors. Their vibrant colors and high-quality print ensure your promotions are seen and remembered by passersby.</p>

<h3 class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Grand Openings & Anniversaries</h3>

<p class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Special events deserve special attention, and our vinyl banners are perfect for drawing in crowds during grand openings, anniversaries, and other milestones. Set the tone for your big day with high-quality banners that command attention and celebrate your achievements. See our <a href="https://www.banners.com/grand-opening-banners">Grand Opening Banners</a>.</p>

<h3 class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Community Events & Festivals</h3>

<p class="text-center" style="text-align: left">From farmer's markets to local festivals, our durable and eye-catching vinyl banners withstand various weather conditions to ensure your message is visible. Perfect for outdoor events, our banners maintain their vibrant colors and structural integrity even in unpredictable weather.</p>

<h3 class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Real Estate & Construction</h3>

<p class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Promote open houses, construction projects, or leasing opportunities with our outdoor vinyl banners. Built to withstand the elements, your message will remain clear and vibrant. Check out our <a href="https://www.banners.com/real-estate-banners">Real Estate Banners </a>for more details.</p>

<h3 class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Seasonal Events</h3>

<p class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Capture attention during holidays, seasonal sales, or special occasions with custom vinyl banners tailored to each event. Whether it’s Easter, Thanksgiving, or Christmas, our banners will make your seasonal designs pop and draw in the crowds.</p>

<h3 class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Sports & School Events</h3>

<p class="text-center" style="text-align: left">Show your school spirit or support your favorite sports team with custom-designed banners that celebrate achievements and events. Our durable materials ensure they can be reused for multiple events, maintaining their high visibility and appeal. Explore our <a href="https://www.banners.com/school-banners">School Banners</a>. </p>

<h2 class="text-center" id="content">Why Vinyl Banners Might be Right for you <a class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" href="#top">Return to Top</a></h2>

<ul>
	<li>Durable means reusable—again and again and again</li>
	<li>Waterproof and UV-resistant for your next outdoor event</li>
	<li>Versatile for indoor and outdoor use</li>
</ul>

<h2 style="text-align: center;">Vinyl Banner Details</h2>

<p>Customizable banners leave a lot for you to choose from. Here’s a breakdown of the available features to help you decide how you’d like your vinyl banner to look. </p>
 

<p><strong>13 oz Vinyl Banners</strong>- High-quality banner material that is light yet durable, for easy set-up and storage </p>

<p><strong>18 oz Vinyl Banners</strong>- Our extra heavy-duty 18 oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material for any condition.</p>

<p><strong>Gloss Finish</strong>- A high shine that produces vibrant, crisp colors and graphics for a high-end look. (available for <strong>13 oz Vinyl Banner</strong>) </p>

<p><strong>Matte Finish</strong>- A low shine and a rich color range. (Available for <strong>13 oz</strong> and <strong>18 oz Vinyl Banners</strong>)</p>

<p><a href="https://www.banners.com/double-sided-banners"><strong>Double-sided Banners</strong></a>- Visible from any two directions to optimize messaging.</p>

<p><a href="https://www.banners.com/mesh-banners"><strong>Mesh Banners</strong></a>- Sporting events, grand openings, you name it. 8 oz PVC polyester mesh is ideal for outdoor and windy conditions.</p>

<p><strong>Grommets</strong>- These reinforced holes around the banner perimeter help prevent tears while the banner is hanging. </p>

<p><strong>Pole Pockets</strong>- 2 inches or 3 inches of material wrapped around the sides, top or bottom to hang the banner.</p>

<p><strong>Hems</strong>- To improve strength, reinforced hems are encouraged for banners used outdoors, in a high-wind environment, or over 32 square feet.</p>

<h2 class="text-center" id="ways-to-order"><br>
Upload → Proof → Print.</h2>

<p>Full-color printing is just that easy. </p>
 

<p>You don’t need to be a professional graphic designer to create a customizable vinyl banner—leave that to us. Choose from free templates, use our <a href="https://www.banners.com/resources/how-to-use-online-designer">In-Browser Designer</a>, or upload your files to create your master piece. Need help? No worries, reach out to our professional graphic designers with any questions.</p>

<p> </p>
</div>

<div class="row p-2 gr-type" id="moreAbout">
<div class="container">
<h2 class="text-center" id="faqs">Frequently Asked Questions <a class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" href="#top">Return to Top</a></h2>

<h3>What vinyl banner material should I choose: 13 oz vs. 18 oz?</h3>

<p>13 oz vinyl is lighter and great for most indoor and outdoor uses. 18 oz vinyl is extra heavy-duty and ideal for harsher outdoor conditions and longer-term use.</p>

<h3>How long do vinyl banners last outdoors?</h3>

<p>Our 13 oz vinyl material is intended to last 3–5 years when used outdoors and 7–10 years when used indoors.</p>

<h3>Are vinyl banners weatherproof and UV-resistant?</h3>

<p>Yes! Vinyl banners are printed on durable, weather-resistant vinyl which is designed to brave most elements.</p>

<h3>What’s the best banner for windy locations?</h3>

<p>Mesh banners are best for high-wind areas because they allow air to pass through, reducing stress on the banner and mounting hardware.</p>

<h3>Do I need hems, and when?</h3>

<p>Hems add strength and durability. They’re recommended for outdoor use, windy environments, or larger banners.</p>

<h3>Do vinyl banners come with grommets?</h3>

<p>Yes. Our standard finishing option includes heat-welded hems with grommets placed in all four corners and every 2–4 feet around the banner perimeter. You can use <a href="https://www.banners.com/products/ball-bungees-4-pack">bungee cords</a> and <a href="https://www.banners.com/products/hanging-clips">hanging clips</a> to help secure your banner.</p>

<h3>How are grommets placed, and can I choose placement?</h3>

<p>Standard grommet placement includes the corners plus spacing approximately every 30 inches around the edges. Custom placement is not recommended because exact positioning cannot be guaranteed.</p>

<h3>Can I order custom sizes or shapes?</h3>

<p>Custom sizes are available. Custom shapes are limited to square or rectangular banners.</p>

<h3>What are pole pockets, and what size do I need?</h3>

<p>Pole pockets are sewn sleeves that allow a pole or rod to slide through for hanging. Choose the size based on your pole diameter and display method:</p>

<ul>
	<li><strong>2" Pole Pocket:</strong> Fits a pole up to 3/4" in diameter</li>
	<li><strong>3" Pole Pocket:</strong> Fits a pole up to 1 1/4" in diameter</li>
	<li><strong>4" Pole Pocket:</strong> Fits a pole up to 1 1/2" in diameter</li>
</ul>

<h3>What finish should I choose: gloss or matte?</h3>

<p>Gloss enhances color vibrancy, while matte reduces glare and improves readability under bright lighting or at angles. Matte is the most popular choice among customers.</p>

<h3>Can vinyl banners be used indoors and outdoors?</h3>

<p>Yes. Vinyl banners are designed for both indoor and outdoor use. Outdoor lifespan depends on sun exposure, wind conditions, and installation method.</p>

<h3>What file types and resolution work best for printing?</h3>

<p>Print-ready PDFs work best. Use high-resolution artwork (typically 150+ DPI at final size) and convert fonts to outlines when possible.</p>

<h3>Will I receive a proof before printing?</h3>

<p>Yes. If requested, we will email a proof for your approval prior to printing.</p>

<h3>How do I hang a vinyl banner securely?</h3>

<p>Use bungee cords through the grommets and maintain even tension. Avoid over-tightening, as this can cause tearing in windy conditions.</p>

<h3>What is the best way to clean my vinyl banner?</h3>

<p>Use lukewarm water and mild dish soap. Avoid abrasive materials, power washers, or stiff brushes, and use soft towels to protect the printed surface.</p>

<h3>How do I best store my banner to keep reusing it?</h3>

<p>Roll the banner with the printed side facing outward, store it in its original box, and keep it away from extreme heat or direct sunlight.</p>
